statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: Performance tuning for SMB file servers
links.summary: Microsoft documents the SMB client cache lifetime and bandwidth throttling values, including defaults and a tuning example for higher-latency scenarios.

links.title: Current network tweak provider
links.summary: The current app writes DisableBandwidthThrottling = 1, FileInfoCacheLifetime = 30, and DirectoryCacheLifetime = 30.
